app.title: BridgeWise Theming Demo
app.description: This page demonstrates the BridgeWise theme system. The heartbeat and status components are styled via CSS variables injected by BridgeWiseProvider, with a custom primary color and dark background.
app.inlineStatusText: An inline status card using the same theme variables as the floating heartbeat.
app.componentOverridesText: The floating heartbeat below uses a custom className to adjust its position while still inheriting all theme variables.
app.componentOverridesHint: Trigger a transaction and you'll see the heartbeat appear in the bottom-left corner.
